meta.description: Metadata object containing resource identification and lifecycle information. Present in ALL resources (100% universal). Contains fields for creation, updates, identification, and resource management.

fields.name: Human-readable name or identifier for the resource (required field)
fields.create_time: ISO timestamp when the resource was created (auto-managed by API)
fields.update_time: ISO timestamp when the resource was last updated (auto-managed by API)
fields.upsert_time: ISO timestamp of last upsert operation (auto-managed by API)
fields.description: Human-readable description of the resource (optional, user-defined)
fields.parent_uuid: UUID of parent resource (for hierarchical relationships)
fields.parent_kind: Type of parent resource (for hierarchical relationships)
fields.tags: List of user-defined tags for categorization and filtering
fields.created_by: User or system that created the resource (auto-managed by API)
fields.updated_by: User or system that last updated the resource (auto-managed by API)
fields.index_data: Search and indexing metadata for the resource (auto-managed by API)

uuid.description: Unique identifier for the resource instance. Present in 94.1% of resources (nearly universal). Immutable field set at creation time.

tenant_meta.description: Tenant-specific metadata including namespace information. Present in 94.1% of resources (nearly universal). Contains tenant isolation and organization data.

fields.namespace: Tenant namespace where the resource belongs (fully qualified name like 'tenant.namespace')

spec.description: Resource-specific specification and configuration data. Present in 88.2% of resources (common). Contains the core business logic and configuration for each resource type.

context.description: Contextual information for the resource. Present when resource has contextual separation (e.g., different scan contexts). Contains context isolation data.

processing_status.description: Status information for resource processing. Present when resource has processing/scanning capabilities. Contains processing state and timing information.

fields.disable_automated_scan: Boolean flag to disable automated scanning for this resource
fields.scan_time: ISO timestamp of last scan operation
fields.analytic_time: ISO timestamp of last analytics processing

ingested_object.description: Information about object ingestion. Present when resource represents ingested external data. Contains ingestion metadata and raw data.

fields.ingestion_time: ISO timestamp when object was ingested from external source
fields.raw: Raw object data before processing and transformation

related_object.description: Related object information. Present when resource has relationships to other objects. Contains relationship metadata.

scan_object.description: Scan object information. Present when resource represents scan results or artifacts. Contains scan-specific metadata.

propagate.description: Propagation flag for hierarchical resources. Present when resource can be propagated to child namespaces. Boolean flag for inheritance behavior.
